title: Trailer Tales
description: A wonderfull modpack that transforms your game in to the Minecraft Trailer!
body:
**A wonderfull pack that creates the game in to the trailer experience!!!**

**The mods Included:**

- Entity Model Features
- Entity Texture Features
- A Good Place
- AmbientSounds
- Animation Overhaul
- Armor Chroma
- Armor Trim Item Fix
- Better Combat
- Cave Dust
- Eating Animation
- Effective
- Make Bubbles Pop
- Iris Shaders
- Not Enough Animations
- Nyf's Spiders
- Particle Rain
- Particular
- Presence Footsteps
- Resourcify
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Soun Physics Remastered
- Subtle Effects
- Visuality

The Resource Packs Included:

- Bare Bones
- Bare Bones-Better Leaves
- Bare Bones-Connected Glass
- Bare Bones x Armor Trim Item Fix
- Bare Bones x Eating Animation
- Bare Bones x Fresh Animations
- Bare Bones x Redstone Torch
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- Minecraft Ten Font

**I hope you can enjoy the pack :)**
